mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_governance_log (scene_type, scene_name, request_summary, response_summary, status, cost_millis, token_count, risk_level, sensitive_hit, error_message, user_id, username, dept_id, tenant_id, create_time) VALUES (#{sceneType}, #{sceneName}, #{requestSummary}, #{responseSummary}, #{status}, #{costMillis}, #{tokenCount}, #{riskLevel}, #{sensitiveHit}, #{errorMessage}, #{userId}, #{username}, #{deptId}, #{tenantId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_governance_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE()
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_governance_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND sensitive_hit = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ai_governance_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND risk_level = 'HIGH'
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(cost_millis)), 0) FROM ai_governance_log WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND cost_millis IS NOT NULL
